theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The brand requires a patriotic, cinematic (dark) hero but child-friendly and readable (light) content sections. Uses Deep Black/Dark Gray for high-impact cinematic hero, and Light Gray for readable, accessible story text. Brand tricolors applied strategically.

body.usage: Paragraphs, labels, button text, standard UI text

accents.usage: Taglines, blockquotes, subtitles, 'Pure Passion. Incredible Journeys.'

spacing_and_layout.general: Use generous padding (p-8, p-12, p-16) to give content breathing room. Ensure high contrast for readability for children and parents.
spacing_and_layout.hero: Cinematic. Use deep black background with sunburst/tricolor accents. Text should be large, clear, and white with gold or saffron highlights.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use Bento grid (Tetris style) for featured stories or categories. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 for asymmetry and interest.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_surfaces: For dark sections: Glassmorphism with deep black/60 and subtle gold/10 border. For light sections: Flat light gray cards with soft shadow-lg and rounded corners.

visual_enhancers.separators: Use gold star icons to separate sections or inline text.
visual_enhancers.accents: Tricolor stripes (Saffron, White, Green) as top borders on cards or header.
visual_enhancers.motion: Silhouettes of children marching. Smooth staggered entrance animations. Hover lifts (-translate-y-1) on cards.

components.Card: Use flat light gray #f5f5f5 backgrounds in light mode with subtle rounding (rounded-xl) and no excessive shadows. In dark mode, use #1a1a1a with a 1px border of gold or white opacity.
components.Button: Primary: Saffron background with White text, hover: brightness increase. Secondary: Outline with Gold border and White text. Always include data-testid.
components.Accordion: Clean lines, Cinzel for titles, Montserrat for content. Use in FAQ. Saffron active state for icons.
components.Dropdown: Shadcn component, white background, black text, saffron hover states.
components.Input: Shadcn input. Light mode: white background, black text. Rounded-md.
components.Tabs: Shadcn tabs. Saffron active underline or background. Cinzel/Montserrat text.
components.Toast: Sonner toast. Dark mode styled for cinematic feel.

logos.description: Full color tricolor flag logo and sunburst

image_urls.description: Cinematic deep black background with subtle Saffron, White, and Green tricolor glowing light rays
Silhouette of diverse children in motion, walking forward confidently
Golden star icon, 3d rendering, metallic shiny finish
Young Indian girl in traditional attire holding a book

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure standard HTML semantic tags are used appropriately with Tailwind.
Implement pure HTML+Tailwind for Marketing/Home page layouts rather than standard Shadcn 'cards', except for interactive elements.
Use generous padding p-12 or p-16 for sections.
For the hero, overlay the child silhouette image (`hero_foreground_silhouette`) over the cinematic tricolor background (`hero_background`). Place text dynamically.
For story detail pages, the layout should emphasize clarity with Light Gray (#f5f5f5) background to ensure readability.
Ensure 'Cinzel' font is loaded from Google Fonts for headings, 'Montserrat' for body, and 'Cormorant Garamond' for italics.
Include data-testid attributes on ALL interactive elements, buttons, inputs, links, forms.
Create the multi-step nomination form using Shadcn form elements customized with Saffron active states.
Provide a smooth responsive experience on mobile.
DO NOT use generic purple/teal gradients. Stick to Saffron, White, Green, Gold, Black, Grays.
